prompt: Subject: Untying in the Sea Breeze. Main: A 3:4 realistic fashion photo. A adult woman leaning out of an open window of a dark blue car, positioned slightly to the right of center. Showing the upper body from waist to head, taking up about 60% of the screen. Capturing the moment she looks up at the bright sky while receiving the sea breeze. Features: Young and natural woman with a friendly face, clear eyes, and a fresh smile. Dark brown hair fluttering in the wind. Outfit: delicate ecru crochet top with a V-neck and ivory pants. Background: Coastal driveway with blue sea, green capes, and a wide summer sky. Lighting: Strong natural noon sunlight from the top right creating clear highlights on skin and shoulders. Composition: Medium shot from a slightly low angle. 35mm lens equivalent. Style: Bright and clean live-action photo like a summer magazine.
